hooks.command: bash -c 'FILE=$(echo "$HOOK_INPUT" | jq -r ".tool_input.file_path // empty"); if [[ "$FILE" == *".env"* ]] || [[ "$FILE" == ".git/"* ]]; then echo "Cannot modify sensitive files" >&2; exit 2; fi'

bash -c 'FILE=$(echo "$HOOK_INPUT" | jq -r ".tool_input.file_path // empty"); if [[ "$FILE" =~ \.(ts|tsx|js|jsx)$ ]] && command -v eslint &>/dev/null; then eslint --fix "$FILE" &>/dev/null || true; fi'
bash -c 'echo "📝 Consider updating documentation for recent changes" >&2'
